entry.title: Interlude
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,783Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 37

Summary: At a glittering Wayne Foundation gala, surrounded by sharp suits and careful scrutiny, Tim Drake and Damian Wayne both feel out of place. What begins as a small act of rebellion blurs into something more intimate and complicated.

entry.title: In Wolf's Clothing
entry.summary:
Author: Yukhta

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,380Chapters: 4/15Kudos: 11

Summary: The beast looked him straight in the eyes, as if seeing straight through everything Damian had so carefully concealed — and he knew at once: this wasn’t a beast; a werewolf, perhaps. Or maybe a clueless young mage or a stray wild spirit. In any case, it was someone who could sense the pulse of magic on instinct. Damian had long since smothered his own. The wolf wouldn’t look away. For some reason, the snap of the trap felt like a handshake.   or   Damian finds a werewolf caught in a trap in the woods. And so his life as a recluse comes to an end.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Shared Lust Of Being A Robin
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,239Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Bruce has been missing for several weeks. Everyone is on edge - Damian knows it, as he’s stepped up in Bruce’s absence. He decides to help relieve the stress of his past Robins.Dick learns how good it feels to be “taken care of” by their oldest brother - and Tim and Jason show him the ropes. Robin Week: Reversed Robins AU

entry.title: Mad Honey on your Teeth
entry.summary:
Author: This_is_your_Heichou_speaking

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,614Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: His body was rocking back and forth, back and forth, and there was a heaviness in between his legs, an electricity in his limbs. He tried to speak, mouth swollen and wet, but all that came out was moans—little gasping whines that he’d never heard himself make before.

entry.title: The final piece of the puzzle
entry.summary:
Author: Reihateangst

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,133Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Tim Drake died too early to be able to get closer to his idol and his family. Unfortunately for the universe, even death won't stop him from trying. (A collection of small scenes of the relationship between the reverse batkids and different versions of Tim, only they don't know that it's Tim, or even that it's one person)

entry.title: Batcest Baby #1
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,129Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 53

Summary: Second trimester of Dick's baby with Bruce.Dick starts to recover from the strain the first trimester put him through, starts seeing the changes on his body and he doesn't know why it makes him feel so strange. Guilt for not being intimate with his partners hurts his relationship but Bruce, Jason, Tim and Damian show him how much they love him regardless.(Tags will be added/edited as I update chapters, reading the previous parts will help you understand their relationship, and this is your DEAD DOVE warning)Enjoy!

entry.title: Everything Falls Down
entry.summary:
Author: noctstate

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: He can allow himself to simply exist here, in the rumble of thunder that vibrates through his bones; the cracks of lightning that smell like ozone and illuminate a dark, cloudy sky; the gusts of wind that throw rain directly into his face, forcing his body to bow against the stinging assault until there’s a lull. It’s during one of those moments, when his eyes are closed, and his hood is up, that the rain stops altogether. The noise, however, does not. It is very much still raining. Damian squints up, face damp and hair plastered to his forehead, to see Red Robin standing above him. His cape held above the both of them as a makeshift shelter.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Damian Wayne
  • Tim Drake (DCU)

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,232Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

entry.title: Heart to Heart
entry.summary:
Author: WhiteBewilderbeast

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,087Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: "You're amazing." The praise always has the other shuddering with relief. "Your every touch. Your every look. Every sound." He utters between kisses, lost in the contact. "Every moment spent with you doesn't last long enough. No single touch can ever fully satisfy. Any..." He breaks the kiss to hold his lover's gaze. Gasping deeply a few times, as if larger quantities of air are needed for the words upcoming.
